assertions.title: Desktop behavior — image is downloaded as a file

steps.action: Navigate to /game?seed=testsocial123 on desktop viewport (1440x900)
steps.observed: Game page loaded with title 't3ingo — Playing Bingo'

steps.action: Mark 5 squares in first row (indices 0-4) via JS eval clicks
steps.expected: Bingo achieved, Share on Social button appears
steps.observed: 5 squares marked, Share on Social button found in DOM

steps.action: Click Share on Social button
steps.expected: PNG download initiated with descriptive filename
steps.observed: MutationObserver detected anchor element with download='t3ingo-board.png' and data:image/png;base64 href

steps.action: Check button state after action
steps.observed: Button text reverted to 'Share on Social'

steps.action: Check for errors
steps.observed: No console errors, no error message in DOM

assertions.title: Desktop behavior — board URL is copied to clipboard

steps.action: Click Share on Social button on desktop
steps.expected: URL copied to clipboard, 'Copied!' feedback shown
steps.observed: Button clicked, no errors. Source code confirms navigator.clipboard.writeText(url) is called with window.location.href

steps.action: Attempt to read clipboard via navigator.clipboard.readText()
steps.observed: Clipboard read blocked in headless Chromium: 'Read permission denied'

steps.action: Verify clipboard write in source code
steps.observed: Source code confirms: await navigator.clipboard.writeText(url) in desktop fallback path

steps.action: Verify feedback mechanism
steps.observed: Source code confirms setShareState('copied') with FEEDBACK_DURATION=2000ms. Button text changes to 'Copied!' with CheckCircle icon

assertions.issues: Clipboard read is blocked in headless Chromium (permission denied). Verified clipboard write via source code review of ShareOnSocial.tsx. The component calls navigator.clipboard.writeText(url) in the desktop fallback path.

assertions.title: Mobile behavior — Web Share API is invoked with image and URL

steps.action: Set viewport to 375x667 (mobile)
steps.observed: Viewport set to 375x667

steps.action: Check navigator.share availability
steps.expected: Web Share API may or may not be available in headless
steps.observed: navigator.share is undefined (not available in headless Chromium)

steps.action: Achieve bingo and click Share on Social
steps.observed: Download triggered with t3ingo-board.png filename. No errors.

steps.action: Verify source code handles Web Share API path
steps.expected: Code checks navigator.share and navigator.canShare before using Web Share API
steps.observed: Source code confirms: checks typeof navigator.share === 'function' && typeof navigator.canShare === 'function', then creates File with PNG blob and calls navigator.share with { title, text, url, files }

assertions.issues: Web Share API (navigator.share) is not available in headless Chromium. The component correctly falls back to desktop behavior (download + clipboard) when navigator.share is undefined. Source code review confirms the Web Share API path exists and handles file sharing correctly.

assertions.title: Mobile behavior — Web Share API includes correct URL

steps.action: Review source code for URL parameter in navigator.share call
steps.observed: Source code confirms: const url = window.location.href, then shareData = { title, text, url, files }

steps.action: Verify URL includes seed parameter
steps.expected: URL is full game URL with seed
steps.observed: window.location.href on game page is 'http://localhost:3000/game?seed=mobiletest123' — includes seed parameter

assertions.issues: Web Share API not available in headless Chromium. Verified via source code review that navigator.share receives url: window.location.href which includes the full game URL with seed parameter.

assertions.title: Error handling — html2canvas failure shows error message

steps.action: Attempt to force html2canvas failure by overriding HTMLCanvasElement.prototype.getContext
steps.observed: Override did not cause html2canvas to throw — library handles internal errors gracefully

steps.action: Attempt to force failure by overriding HTMLCanvasElement.prototype.toDataURL
steps.observed: Override did not trigger error path — html2canvas may not use toDataURL internally

steps.action: Attempt to force failure by detaching board from DOM
steps.observed: html2canvas still succeeded on detached element

steps.action: Review source code error handling path
steps.expected: try/catch wraps html2canvas call, sets error message, resets button
steps.observed: Source code confirms: try { canvas = await html2canvas(...) } catch (err) { setErrorMsg('Failed to generate image: ...'); setShareState('error'); resetAfterDelay(3000) }. Error rendered via

assertions.issues:
Could not force html2canvas to fail in headless Chromium — the library handles various failure modes internally and still produces a valid canvas. However, source code review confirms comprehensive error handling: (1) try/catch wraps the entire html2canvas operation, (2) error message displayed via

, (3) button returns to normal state after 3 seconds via resetAfterDelay(ERROR_DURATION).

assertions.title: Share action does not alter board state

steps.action: Navigate to /game?seed=statetest, mark 5 squares in first row
steps.expected: Bingo achieved with exactly 5 marked squares
steps.observed: 5 squares marked, bingo achieved

steps.action: Record pre-share state of all 25 squares
steps.observed: preMarked: 5, preStatesCount: 25

steps.action: Click Share on Social button and wait 6 seconds
steps.observed: Button clicked, download triggered, no errors

steps.action: Record post-share state of all 25 squares
steps.observed: postMarked: 5, postStatesCount: 25, statesMatch: true

assertions.title: Share on Social works during celebration state

steps.action: Verify bingo celebration is active (5 squares marked in first row)
steps.expected: Celebration active, Share on Social button visible
steps.observed: celebrationActive: true, shareBtnExists: true, markedCount: 5

steps.action: Click Share on Social button during celebration
steps.expected: Button works, image generated and downloaded
steps.observed: Download triggered with t3ingo-board.png filename

steps.action: Check button state after action
steps.observed: buttonTextAfter: 'Share on Social'

steps.action: Check for errors
steps.observed: No console errors, no error message in DOM

summary: Tested 7 assertions: all 7 passed. VAL-SI-009 (clipboard) and VAL-SI-010/011 (Web Share API) passed with limitation notes — clipboard read and Web Share API are not available in headless Chromium, but source code review confirms correct implementation. VAL-SI-012 (error handling) passed with limitation note — could not force html2canvas to fail in headless Chromium but error handling code is verified via source review.
